steps.title: Use the margin of error
steps.content: A margin of error gives a plausible interval around the estimate. Subtract and add $0.11$ to the estimated mean price of $3.76$.

steps.title: Find the interval
steps.content: Compute the lower and upper bounds: $$ 3.76-0.11=3.65 $$ $$ 3.76+0.11=3.87 $$ So the plausible mean price is between 3.65 dollars and 3.87 dollars. The answer is A.
